creator: steffen@fritz.wtf
text:
Please see this bug: https://github.com/nbs-system/naxsi/issues/593

The used nginx version uses pcre2 and Naxsi is not running with it, this happened to me.

As the original project seems to be abandoned the source should probably be changed to https://github.com/wargio/naxsi

Sidenote: As this is a security relevant product it should be checked if the new source is credible.

BR,

Steffen
